summary: Food ordering app (Healthy Yummy Bites) with WhatsApp order integration, checkout flow, and mobile-friendly UI.
architectural_notes: WhatsApp order message must use exact format: 'New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites', followed by customer details and order items. Quantity format: 'Number + space + x + space + Full Item Name - ₹Price'. No emojis. No shortened names. Each item on its own line.

existing_features.title:
Update the WhatsApp order message formatter in `frontend/src/utils/whatsappOrder.ts` to produce a message in exactly the following structure, with no emojis and no shortening of item names:

```
New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites

Customer Details
Name: {Customer Name}
Phone: {Customer Phone}
Address: {Customer Full Address}

Order Items
{quantity} x {Full Item Name} - ₹{price}
...

Total Amount: ₹{total}
Payment Method: Cash on Delivery / UPI
```

Rules to enforce in code:
- Quantity format must always be: `{number} x {Full Item Name}` — with a space before and after the `x`.
- Item names must be used exactly as stored in `menuData.ts` — never truncated, never abbreviated.
- Each order item must be on its own line.
- No emojis anywhere in the message.
- The message header must be `New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites` (no emoji).
- Section labels must be plain text: `Customer Details`, `Order Items`, `Total Amount:`, `Payment Method:`.

Update `frontend/src/components/CheckoutModal.tsx` to ensure that the staff confirmation template rendered in the modal (copy-to-clipboard content) uses the same corrected message format as the WhatsApp URL — full item names, `{number} x {Full Item Name}` quantity format, no emojis, and the exact section structure defined in REQ-1.
